mdRecord.dcterms:title: Fiduciary Accounts: Receivership/estate of Ola A. Howard, Under the age of 21 , without a guardian
mdRecord.dcterms:description: Receivership/estate of Ola A. Howard, Under the age of 21 , without a guardian W.L. Howard, Receiver B.G. Howard, Receiver Recorded in the Settlement Book, page 479, of the Floyd County Circuit Court

mdRecord.dcterms:provenance: Virginia Polytechnic Institute and State University. University Libraries
